summary: Iteration 2 (institutional-grade dashboard refinement) tested end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases pass — 3 new tests verify score_breakdown (6 keys, weights summing to 100, exact spec weights 25/20/15/15/15/10), expanded design_intelligence (>=10 keys incl. hospitality_positioning, furnishing_cohesion, material_palette, guest_emotional_perception) and expanded market_intelligence (>=8 keys incl. local_market_insights, neighborhood_intelligence, seasonal_performance). Real Claude Sonnet 4.5 analyze test run on a TEST_ property — AI returned new schema (score_breakdown 6 keys w/ weights=100, all expanded design+market keys present). Frontend: /dashboard/demo passes all checks — Asset Score count-up=82, all 6 BreakdownRow data-testids render with progress bars, four performance tiles show €145/71%/€37,550/8.6%, chart renders with Revenue+ADR lines and refined stylings, Design Intelligence panel shows all 4 new rows, Market Intelligence section shows the 3 new entries, action plan tabs (quick_wins/medium_upgrades/high_roi_renovations) switch correctly. /analyze cinematic overlay (data-testid=cinematic-overlay + analysis-stages) appears on submit with all 8 expected stage strings and the rotating 'in progress' indicator cycles. Landing/pricing/method regression OK. No regressions on iteration 1 features.

minor.issue: When emergentintegrations raises ChatError (e.g. LiteLLM budget exceeded) it bubbles to a 500 instead of being caught and returned as 502/503. Test had to widen skip set to (500,502,503). Wrap run_ai_analysis in try/except and translate to 502 'AI provider error'.

integration_issues.issue: Page stayed on 'Verifying session…' >8s without redirecting to /login after cookies cleared. Iteration 1 verified redirect works; behavior may be a stale-context artifact. Not blocking but recommend ensuring /api/auth/me 401 path explicitly navigates to /login regardless of error type (axios network error vs 401).

issues: Recharts emits the usual width(-1)/height(-1) console warning on first render (cosmetic only — chart resolves correctly). Same as iteration 1.

action_items: (Minor) Catch emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError in run_ai_analysis and re-raise as HTTPException(502, ...) so analyze never returns a raw 500 on AI provider/budget errors.
(Minor) ProtectedRoute: ensure unauthenticated /api/auth/me errors always redirect to /login even on axios network errors — confirm there's no race where the loading state persists indefinitely.
critical_code_review_comments: DEMO_ANALYSIS score_breakdown weights (25/20/15/15/15/10) match spec and sum to 100 — verified.

ANALYSIS_SYSTEM_PROMPT correctly enumerates the 6 score_breakdown keys with explicit weights, the 10 design_intelligence keys, and the 8 market_intelligence keys. AI compliance verified end-to-end against live Claude Sonnet 4.5.
Dashboard.jsx: Reveal/CountUp/BreakdownRow are clean and isolated. CountUp uses requestAnimationFrame with cleanup — good. Could memoize target for very fast prop changes, but not needed here.
Analyze.jsx CinematicOverlay properly bound to submitting state with interval cleanup on unmount — no leak.
server.py is now ~756 lines; DEMO_ANALYSIS+DEMO_PROPERTY block is the bulk and would be a natural split candidate (e.g. /app/backend/seed/demo.py) for maintainability.
No MongoDB ObjectId leakage observed in any response (all reads project {_id:0}).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-2 features (dashboard 6 breakdowns, count-up, expanded design/market, chart, action tabs, cinematic overlay 8 stages)

test_credentials: Inserted ad-hoc users + sessions in MongoDB test_database (per /app/auth_testing.md). FE cookie used: test_session_fe_1778223032938. Backend pytest creates per-run sessions in conftest.
seed_data_creation: MongoDB users + user_sessions inserted by conftest._create_session() and FE cookie injection. Test properties prefixed TEST_VELA_*/TEST_OverlayCheck. Not auto-cleaned but isolated per user_id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend entrypoint: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_vela_backend.py -v. test_analyze takes ~30-60s (real Claude). If LLM budget is exhausted, test will skip on 500/502/503. New iteration-2 backend tests: TestDemo::test_demo_score_breakdown, test_demo_design_intelligence_expanded, test_demo_market_intelligence_expanded. For FE auth, inject session_token cookie at the preview domain (Secure, SameSite=None, HttpOnly).
rca of the issue: No iteration-2-introduced regressions. Two pre-existing minor concerns flagged: (1) analyze endpoint surfaces 500 on LiteLLM ChatError instead of 502 — wrap in try/except; (2) ProtectedRoute loading state may not redirect on certain auth-check failure modes — needs verification of the /api/auth/me error path.
